_comment: Inbound email routing for tokenomic.org. Outbound alert mail (workers/api-worker/alerts.js) goes via MailChannels and is unrelated to these rules; these handle mail *arriving* at the zone.

rules.name: tkn-managed: forward alerts mailbox to OPS_ALERT_EMAIL
rules._comment: alerts@ is the From: address used by workers/api-worker/alerts.js when the AE error-spike Cron fires. This rule forwards bounces, NDRs and replies to the on-call mailbox so we don't lose telemetry. ${OPS_ALERT_EMAIL} is interpolated by apply.sh from the env var of the same name; that address must be added as a verified destination in the Email Routing dashboard before applying.

rules.name: tkn-managed: forward postmaster + abuse to OPS_ALERT_EMAIL
rules._comment: RFC 2142 mandatory mailboxes. Required for some upstream providers (e.g. AWS SES bounce notifications) to consider us a well-run sender.

catch_all.name: tkn-managed: drop catch-all
catch_all._comment: Anything not matched above is silently dropped — we are not running a general-purpose mail server. Specific named mailboxes (hello@, support@, etc.) should be added as their own rules above this catch-all.
